arts.ttl: Inter Milan offer fresh Lautaro Martinez injury update ahead of Barcelona battle
arts.sum: Inter Milan have offered an injury update on star striker Lautaro Martinez ahead of their UEFA Champions League showdown with Barcelona. Hansi Flick’s side head to the San Siro for their semi final second leg on May 6 on the back of a thrilling 3-3 first leg clash.
